body.text: End-of-day Friday: House Judiciary ghost-gun hearing wrapped, SCOTUS conference concluded with orders Monday, H.R. 38 aftermath into the weekend cycle

House Judiciary ghost-gun oversight hearing wrapped this afternoon; clip-and-react now rolling into the weekend. SCOTUS conference concluded — orders list Monday May 11. H.R. 38 reciprocity post-vote cycle is dominant; permit-holder forums and border-state searches at session highs.

• House Judiciary ghost-gun oversight hearing has wrapped — weekend clip-and-react cycle in motion
• SCOTUS conference concluded — orders list anchored to Monday May 11; pre-position both scenarios
• H.R. 38 reciprocity post-vote cycle continues into the weekend; border-state searches at highs
• End of day 2: comment counts climbed sharply on brace and EITB proposed rules
